languages.original_text: "I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."

languages.text: "Я согласен, Нунциус. Помещение столь впечатляющего масштаба могло быть использовано с куда большей эффективностью. Вряд ли тот, кто ныне здесь властвует, знаком с основами священного учения об эргономике".

"I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."

"I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."

languages.text: «Coincido, Nuncius. Una sala de un tamaño tan imponente podría haber encontrado un uso mucho mejor. Es poco probable que el gobernante actual tenga alguna familiaridad con los fundamentos de las enseñanzas sagradas de la ergonomía».
languages.original_text: "I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."

traits.locale_text: «Coincido, Nuncius. Una sala de un tamaño tan imponente podría haber encontrado un uso mucho mejor. Es poco probable que el gobernante actual tenga alguna familiaridad con los fundamentos de las enseñanzas sagradas de la ergonomía».

languages.text: 「まったく同感です、ヌンキウス。これほど堂々たる規模の部屋なら、はるかに有効に活用できたはずです。今ここを治める者が、人間工学の神聖な教えの基礎を心得ているとは、とても思えません」
languages.original_text: "I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."

traits.locale_text: 「まったく同感です、ヌンキウス。これほど堂々たる規模の部屋なら、はるかに有効に活用できたはずです。今ここを治める者が、人間工学の神聖な教えの基礎を心得ているとは、とても思えません」

languages.text: “我完全同意，努恩修斯。如此宏伟的房间本可更高效地利用。统治这里的人，显然不太了解人体工学神圣教义的基本原理。”
languages.original_text: "I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."

traits.locale_text: “我完全同意，努恩修斯。如此宏伟的房间本可更高效地利用。统治这里的人，显然不太了解人体工学神圣教义的基本原理。”

languages.text: "Ich stimme Euch zu, Nuncius. Ein Raum von so imposanter Größe könnte einem weit größeren Zweck gedient haben. Vermutlich ist der Mann, der jetzt hier herrscht, nicht mit den Grundlagen der heiligen Lehren der Ergonomie vertraut."
languages.original_text: "I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."

traits.locale_text: "Ich stimme Euch zu, Nuncius. Ein Raum von so imposanter Größe könnte einem weit größeren Zweck gedient haben. Vermutlich ist der Mann, der jetzt hier herrscht, nicht mit den Grundlagen der heiligen Lehren der Ergonomie vertraut."

languages.text: « Je suis d'accord, Nuncius. Un espace aussi vaste aurait dû être mieux exploité. Il semble improbable que son propriétaire ait connaissance des fondamentaux sacrés de l'ergonomie. »
languages.original_text: "I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis d'accord, Nuncius. Un espace aussi vaste aurait dû être mieux exploité. Il semble improbable que son propriétaire ait connaissance des fondamentaux sacrés de l'ergonomie. »

languages.text: "Kesinlikle katılıyorum Nuncius. Böylesine heybetli bir oda, çok daha etkili bir şekilde kullanılabilirdi. Burayı şu an yöneten kişinin ergonominin kutsal öğretilerinin temellerine aşina olması pek olası değil."
languages.original_text: "I quite agree, Nuncius. A room of such imposing scale could have been utilised to far greater effect. It is unlikely that the man who now rules here is familiar with the fundamentals of the sacred teachings of ergonomics."
